title: Create Technical Foundry: Fancy Pack
description:
Fancy visuals pack for the Create Technical Foundry servers, provides a few visual improvements through resource packs
and some effects.
body:
Fancy visuals pack for the Create Technical Foundry servers, provides a few visual improvements through resource packs
and some effects, as well as contains shader support for those who have the hardware to run them.

### Other packs:

- [Minimal Pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/foundry-minimal): Absolute minimal vanilla-like experience.
- [Deluxe Pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/foundry-deluxe): All-out visual update for the most powerful machines.
- [Server Pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/foundry-server): All the server-side mods with World Generation and Management.

### Main mods:

_The primary technical mods that the content is designed around._

- [Create: Post Production](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Create: Aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics) ⸺ Simulated Contraptions
- [Create: Steam & Rails](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-steam-n-rails-1.21.1) ⸺ Extensions for Trains
- [Create: Power Loader](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-power-loader) ⸺ Simplifies chunk-loading using Trains
- [Create: Metalwork](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-metalwork) ⸺ Alternative Ore processing
- [Create: Oxidized](https://modrinth.com/mod/create_oxidized) ⸺ Alternative Copper processing

### Supporting mods

_Details that is mainly preferences and decoration._

- [Create: Deco](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-deco) ⸺ Industrial decorations
- [Create: Vibrant Vaults](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-vibrant-vaults) ⸺ Colorful Vaults, Frogports, Peckagers, and Requesters
- [Create: More Girders](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-more-girder) ⸺ Structural Girders
- [Create: Blocks & Bogies](https://modrinth.com/mod/blocks-bogies) ⸺ Many train parts for Decorations
- [Create: Copycats+](https://modrinth.com/mod/copycats) ⸺ Main Decoration Tools
- [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) ⸺ Primary decorations
- [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped) ⸺ Extra block palettes
- [Diagonal Fences](https://modrinth.com/mod/diagonal-fences) ⸺ Flexibility for railings
- [Beans Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/beans-backpacks-3) ⸺ Not-too-overpowered extra inventory
- [Comforts](https://modrinth.com/mod/comforts) ⸺ Handy sleeping bags for travelling
- [Map Atlasses](https://modrinth.com/mod/map-atlases-forge) ⸺ In-world map management
- [Vanilla Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport) ⸺ Contents from latest drops
- [Wood Good](https://modrinth.com/mod/every-compat) ⸺ Compatibility for woods and palettes
- [Stone Zone](https://modrinth.com/mod/stone-zone) ⸺ Compatibility for stones and palettes

### Mechanic changes

_Differences from Vanilla balance._

- [Amendments](https://modrinth.com/mod/amendments) ⸺ Tweaks to vanilla features
- [Aileron](https://modrinth.com/mod/aileron) & [Gliders](https://modrinth.com/mod/gliders) ⸺ Promotes infrastructure over free-fly with rockets
- [Better Days](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterdays) ⸺ Helps with day-night cycle without simply time travelling
- [Easy Anvils](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-anvils) ⸺ Major improvements for repairs lessening the need for Mending
- [Easy Magic](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-magic) ⸺ Lowers the RNG stress with enchantment re-rolls
- [End Remastared](https://modrinth.com/mod/endrem) ⸺ Additional goals for unlocking the end for slowing the progressing down slightly
- [End Anchor](https://modrinth.com/mod/endanchor) ⸺ Tiny End-based transportation utility to round-up the anchor family
- [Horseman](https://modrinth.com/mod/horseman) ⸺ Improvements to horses that they deserve
- [Ender Dragon Remastered](https://modrinth.com/datapack/edf-remastered) ⸺ Epic final boss-fight
- [Shuffle Filter](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-shuffle-filter) ⸺ Alternative deployer filter

### Effects and Visuals added compare to Minimal Pack

_engine upgrade via Mods:_

- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) ⸺ The shader engine for Sodium
- [Create: Better FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/createbetterfps) ⸺ Flywheel optimization for Iris
- [Flywheel: Colorwheel](https://modrinth.com/mod/colorwheel) ⸺ Applies Flywheel optimizations for Iris
- [BSL Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders) ⸺ Enhanced vanilla aesthetic
- [Complementary Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) ⸺ Clean vanilla-like style

_via Mods, some of them disabled by default to allow you to Opt-in:_

- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) ⸺ Depth to the Skins!
- [Better Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person) ⸺ Detaches the Camera in 3rd Person from the Looking direction
- [Better Clouds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-clouds) ⸺ Layered volumetric clouds
- [Explosive Enhancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/explosive-enhancement-forge) ⸺ Visually pleasing EXPLOOOOOOOOSION!
- [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleavesforge) ⸺ Brings life to the vegetation
- [Particle Effects](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-effects) ⸺ Shows player effects visually with particles
- [Subtle Effects](https://modrinth.com/mod/subtle-effects) ⸺ Tiny detail effects around items
- [Particular](https://modrinth.com/mod/particular-reforged) ⸺ Satisfying particles and effects to the world
- [ImmersiveUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-ui) ⸺ Visual feedback in the Inventory and Hotbar
- [Item Highlighter](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-highlighter) ⸺ Simple notification to spot newly picked up items
- [Pick Up Notifier](https://modrinth.com/mod/pick-up-notifier) ⸺ Helpful logs for item pick-ups
- [Held Item Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/held-item-tooltips) ⸺ Useful tooltips when changing tools

_via Resource Packs:_

- [3D Crops](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-crops) ⸺ Lightweight models for crops and vegetation 
- [Fancy Crops](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancy-crops) ⸺ Fluffier crops and seeds
- [3D Ladders](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rays-3d-ladders) ⸺ Un-flatten that ladder!
- [3D Rails](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rays-3d-rails) ⸺ Un-flatten the rails!
- [Flower Clusters](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/flower-clusters) ⸺ Fluffier flower gardens
- [Lower Grass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-lower-grass-sides) ⸺ Minimize the dirtification of hills
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) ⸺ Bring all mobs a little-bit more alive!
- [Detailed Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/detailed-animations) ⸺ Superhero landing, is there anything else needed?
- [Biomed Creepers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/biomed-creepers) ⸺ Budget creeper overhaul for maximum jump-scare!
- [50% Armor](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/-50-of-armor) ⸺ Balance between Armor and Skin, as it should be
- [Glowing Glints](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/glowing-glints) ⸺ Make enchantment really shine!

### Tools

_Disabled by default, and up to your preference to enable them!_

- [Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom) ⸺ Building utilities
- [Spark](https://modrinth.com/mod/spark) & [Observable](https://modrinth.com/mod/observable) ⸺ Technical tools for  profiling
- [Item Swapper](https://modrinth.com/plugin/itemswapper) ⸺ Inventory utility
- [Freecam](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam) ⸺ Creator tool for cinematic shots
- [Mocap](https://modrinth.com/mod/motion-capture) ⸺ Recording and playback mod for NPC bots
- [Lighty](https://modrinth.com/mod/lighty) ⸺ Technical tool for spawn management
- [Forgematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgematica) ⸺ Schematic display and builder tool

### External tools

_Since these are not distributed on Modrinth, you will need to manually install these!_

- [ReForgedPlay](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/reforgedplay-mod) ⸺ Recording tool
